testcase.name: alldata (unit) > addCitizen (positive): adds a new citizen
alldata (unit) > addCitizen (positive): updates existing citizen when idNumber already exists
alldata (unit) > updateCitizen (negative): returns null when citizen does not exist
alldata (unit) > car request flow (integration): addCarRequest -> approveCarRequest creates a car
alldata (unit) > rejectCarRequest (negative): returns null for missing requestId
Login (integration) > positive: logs in and navigates to the role dashboard
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: Login (integration) > negative: shows an error message when credentials are invalid
services/api > login (positive): calls the API and returns parsed JSON
services/api > login (negative): throws API error message when response is not ok
services/api > getCitizens (positive): includes role filter in querystring when provided
